[cron:0f65bca4-8d31-40d6-8d98-d1f8e1a97258 HB Trading 30m] HB Trading 30m
Current time: Saturday, February 28th, 2026 — 10:00 (Europe/Madrid)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Here is the summary for the HB Trading 30m cron job:

Current time: Saturday, February 28th, 2026 at 10:00 (Europe/Madrid)

This is a recurring task to check the status of the HB Trading system every 30 minutes. The job should:

1. Poll the HB Trading API for the latest trading data and account status.
2. Analyze the data and generate a brief summary report.
3. Store the report in the daily log file under /Users/FIRMAS/.openclaw/workspace/memory/2026-02-28.md.
4. If any issues or anomalies are detected, send an alert to the trading team Slack channel.

Let me know if you need anything else!
